headline: Top news of the day: March 29, 2026
news_summary: The day’s major stories include Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressing the West Asia crisis in his Mann Ki Baat with an appeal to not politicise the issue, a Supreme Court statement that incarceration without trial is punishment as it grants bail to a Punjab resident jailed for two years, actor Vijay’s electoral debut from two seats in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, Union Home Minister Amit Shah asserting that merely curbing infiltration in Assam is not enough and all illegal immigrants must be deported, and Indian Railways calling for stricter controls to curb unauthorised expenditure across its projects.
